title: Biomancer ReRise
body:
A dense atmospheric-horror exploration pack built on a heavily overhauled world.
Swamps, caves, rivers, and biomes are reimagined through WWOO, YUNG’s worldgen suite, BetterNether/BetterEnd, and environmental detail mods. Ambient creatures, unsettling entities, pulsing mists, and eerie soundscapes create constant tension as you explore
